meaning: n.罗马圆形大剧场(建于公元80年,耗时5年,至今大部分尚存)
examples: Opening the underground corridor for the public will coincide with the extensive restoration of the Colosseum.
The Colosseum in Rome was opened in 80 A.D.
Rome's Colosseum was 157 feet tall and had 80 entrances, seating 50,000 people.
The article 'Going underground at the Colosseum' was published in partnership with Lonely Planet.
He then oversaw a ceremony at the 2, 000-year-old Colosseum recalling Christ's final journey with the cross.
